titleStmt.title: SII 19.58: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 58. (A.R. No. 556 of 1920.) UḌAIYARKUḌI NEAR KĀṬṬUMANNĀRKŌYIL, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, ANANTĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a gift of 13(1/2) kaḻañju of gold (for the purchase of 96 sheep) deposited with the maṉṟāḍikkalanai (assembly) including the vāriyaṉ (executive ?) of Vīranārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tiruvanantīśvarattu-Paramasvāmi, by Kāṭṭukuṟi Yajña-Kramavittaṉ a resident of Paṇḍitavatsala-chēri a quarter of the village. This might be assigned to Uttama-Chōḷa in whose 3rd year the details Makā1ra, Thursday, Aviṭṭam corresponded to A.D. 972, January 18, f.d.n. 86. Paṇḍitavatsala was a surname of Parāntaka I.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 3Āvatu vaṭakaraip piramate
cam śrīviranārāyaṇacaturvvetimaṅkalattu vāriyaṉuḷḷiṭṭa maṉṟā
ṭikkalaṉaiyom Ivūr tiruvaṉan=tiśvarattu paramasvāmikku Oṭṭi śilālekhai
ceytukuṭutta paricāvatu . Ivvūr śrī paṇṭitavatsalacceri kāṭṭukkuṟi yañña
kramavittaṉ Ivvāṭṭai makaranāyaṟṟu(nāyaṟṟu) vicāḻakkiḻamai peṟṟa Aviṭṭa mu
talāka cantrādityavat Oru non=tāviḷak kiravum pakalu merivataṟku kuṭutta po
poṉ patiṉmukkaḻañcarai poṉṉuṅ koṇṭu toṇṇūṟāṭṭāl nicati Uḻakku neyya
ṭṭakaṭavomāka veṭṭi śilālekhai (v)airaiyntukuṭuttom vāriyaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭa
maṉṟāṭikkalaṉaiyom Idharma
m rakṣippār muvāyirattaṟunū
ṟu tiruvaṭiiṉuṭaiya rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.58 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
